mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (chat_session_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, message_type, is_read, send_time) VALUES (#{chatSessionId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{isRead}, #{sendTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY send_time ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE message_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE chat_session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY send_time DESC LIMIT 1
